titleStmt.title: SII 18.294: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 294. (B.K. No. 54 of 1933-34.) KEṄGOṆḌA, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription which refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyidēvarasa as ruling over Beḷuhuge Seventy and Banavāsi Twelve-thousand is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 102, Viḷambi, Puśhya śu. 3, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. In Viḷaṁbi neither śu. 3 nor the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa fell on Sunday. In the previous year, however, (i.e., in Hēmaḷambi) both these did occur on Sunday. So if the latter is the intended date, its equivalent would be A.D. 1177, December 25, Sunday. The year 102 is the latest known year of the Chālukya-Vikrama era.

It records the gift of land made by Dāsa-gāvuṇḍa of Honuṅgali or Honugali and his son Hariyamma for the worship and offerings of the god Mūlasthāna-Mallikārjuna and for effecting repairs to the temple. The gift was entrusted to Kariya Dharmarāśi-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. It also records gifts of tolls, etc., made by Suṅkada Gāvuṇḍa-Sāvi and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē © Onamaḥ sivayaThe letter ya is written below the line.
© svasti samastabhuvanajanasaṁstūyamānacāruca
raṇāravinda vairibaḷaviḷayagōviṁda pāṭaḷī
puravarādhīśvaraṁ kīrttyaṁganādhīśvaraṁ Ujjēnīmahā
kāḷadēva tālabdhavaraprasāda raṇakēḷīvinōdaThe letter va is written below the line.
caṁdraguptānvayelalāṭalōcana dharmmāmri
tāṁbūṣacana (tāṁbuśēcana) guttakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa sama
rapracaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikabhairavaṁ śrīvikramādityavaṁ
śōdbhavarappa śrīmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara jōyidēvarasaru
beḷuhugeyeppattumaṁ banavāsi pannircchāsiramumaṁ
sukhasaṁkatā(thā)vinōdadināḷuttire . tatpādapadmōpajī
vi homaṁgaliya dāsagāvuṁḍanuṁ maga hariyamma
gāvuṁḍanumavara negartteyeṁteṁdaḍe . sthiratege mēru
dāratege ravisutanāhavadalli pārtthanaṁtatisaya
dharmmaputra nuḍidallige tāṁ caladaṁkarāmanāśri
tasuradhēnuveṁdu dhare baṇnisuguṁ prabhudāsagaṁ
vuṁḍana . Ātana satputraṁ kuladīpakamene negaḻda
satyadāgaraṁ sadguṇasajjātaṁ hariyammagavuṁḍana maga ca
tra © tammibbarumiddu honugaliya mūla sthāna śrīmalliThe letter la is written below the line.
kārjjunadēvaraṁgabhōgakaṁ nivēdyanaṁdādīvigegaṁ khaṁḍa
sphuṭitajīrṇnōdārakaṁ sadākālaṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭa dha
rmma hiriya keṟeya baḍagaṇa tuṁbiṁda paḍuva muṁ
dāgi hariva bāyikalla mūdala maḍavāya gaddekamma
Ippattumaṁ Ūriṁ baḍa ga dēvaṇageṟege hōda hiṟiyaThe letter ḍa is written below the line.
Ōṇiyiṁda mūḍaṇasthaḷadalli Eremattaroṁdu ha
teṁkalu kisumatara Antu beddale matta 2 maṁ cāḷu
kyavikramavariṣada 102 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada
puṣyasuddhatadige Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vya
tīpātakūḍadalli Ā sthānadācāryyarappa kariya
dharmmarāsipaṁḍitara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrbakamāḍi sarbanamaḥsya
mānyamāḍi biṭṭaru © mataṁ suṁkada gāvuṁḍasāviyuṁ viṭṭarasa
naraṇadēvanuṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ sadākālaṁ na
ḍevaṁtāgalliya Ele Okkala hejuṁka maṁneyadeṟeyumaṁ Oṁdu
gāṇada maṁneyumaṁ biṭṭaru © Ī dharmmamanārorbaru pratipāḷisi
davargge gaṁgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradalli sāsirakavileya
kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ poṁnoḷu kaṭṭisi brāhmaṇarggubhaya
mukhigoṭṭa phalamaku . Ī dharmmavanaḷidātanā kṣētra
doḷākavileyuṁ brāhmaṇa rumaṁnaḷiḍa pātakanakku ©The letters ṇa and da are written below the line.
Digital edition of SII 18.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
